allow: Bash(node -e "const { Pool } = require\('pg'\); const p = new Pool\({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL, ssl: { rejectUnauthorized: false } }\); p.query\('SELECT 1'\).then\(\(\) => console.log\('DB ok'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('DB error:', e.message\)\).finally\(\(\) => p.end\(\)\)")
